sessions.description: PDE homework, first four problems: 1. Solving heat equation with a forcing term and either a Dirichlet or Neumann condition 2. Energy of heat equation is dissipated and thus solution is unique 3. Dirichlet eigenvalue on bounded domain. "Big drums have low tones" 4. If $u$ solves heat equation with Dirichlet and initial impulse $g(x)$, then $v(x) = \int_0^{\infty} u(x, t) dt$ solves the Poisson equation $\Delta v = -g$.
